title: eragrostis nigricans var. tristis
intro: Eragrostis nigricans var. tristis, also known as the black grass or red grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Eragrostis nigricans var. tristis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate congestion, and soothe sore throats. Eragrostis nigricans var. tristis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
